Risk_Description: User financial information may be accessed by unauthorized users
Mitigation_Action: Restrict access to authorized users only and protect personal financial data

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may edit or delete transaction records
Mitigation_Action: Require authentication and allow only authorized users to edit or delete records

Risk_Description: Icons or images may be used without proper license
Mitigation_Action: Use open-license assets and document all sources

Risk_Description: Users may misunderstand budget summaries as financial advice
Mitigation_Action: Display a disclaimer that the system is for personal budget tracking only

Risk_Description: Duplicate or incorrect transaction entries may affect budget reports
Mitigation_Action: Validate input data and prevent duplicate transactions

Risk_Description: Transaction notes may contain sensitive personal information
Mitigation_Action: Allow users to edit or delete notes and avoid exposing personal information
